jobName.description: Spring Batch Job name - ReindexJob or GraphCleaningJob

startDate.description: Date and time when the batch job was started

endDate.description: Date and time when the batch job finished

startedBy.description: ID of the user who started the batch job

reindexType.description: Type of reindex: full or incremental

linesRead.description: Total number of resources read during job execution

linesSent.description: Total number of resources written during job execution

status.description: Current status of the batch job (e.g. STARTED, COMPLETED, FAILED)
